name: io.github.OrangeproAI/orangepro
title: OrangePro
description: Find test gaps, generate grounded tests, and dynamically prove behavior with mutation testing.

packageArguments.description: Run in MCP server mode (stdio transport)

environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional OpenAI BYOK key for AI candidate links and test generation.

environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional Anthropic BYOK key for AI candidate links and test generation.

environmentVariables.name: OLLAMA_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Optional Ollama endpoint for local AI candidate links and test generation.
